sources.evidence: The artist-branded Linktree identifies Super American Eagle and links the same Bandcamp catalogue, YouTube channel, merchandise and current official video.
The artist's official Linktree points to this Bandcamp profile; it identifies Super American Eagle as a Melbourne artist and carries the verified catalogue.
The artist's official Linktree points to this Bandcamp profile; the profile contains the self-titled album and current Super American Eagle releases.
Spotify identifies the Melbourne trio, its members and the same verified catalogue including Yes, Anxiety Nightie, Gone and the self-titled album.
The artist's official Linktree links directly to this Super American Eagle YouTube channel.
The artist's official Linktree labels this Sound Merch product as Super American Eagle Tees.
Blurred Culture's published Troubadour review identifies the same Australian trio and reviews Super American Eagle's opening performance for Jet.
The artist's official Linktree currently promotes this video as 'Anxiety Nightie Video Clip'.
Cheersquad's current artist release identifies Brent DeBoer, Bob Harrow and Dave Mudie and describes the band's heavy psych-sludge sound.
